message:
Add original PNG source for hero illustration

The WebP derivative (pcr_illustration.webp, 359KB at quality 95) is
already tracked and referenced in the README. This commit adds the
original PNG source file (1.9MB, 1536x1024, 8-bit RGB) so the
full-resolution asset is preserved in version control for future
re-exports at different sizes or formats.

The macOS resource fork file (._pcr_illustration.png) is intentionally
excluded as ephemeral platform metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
